overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walk through a rain-slicked neon-lit night market. The player character approaches a food stall, interacts with the vendor area, then moves through narrow industrial corridors into a more open market plaza with vibrant holographic signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market walkway with food stalls

events.description: approaching the illuminated food stall with red neon overhead lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered market toward a food stall with red neon lighting

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the food preparation counter

entered.detail: overhead metal roof structure covering the market walkway
food preparation stall with cooking equipment and warm lighting
row of red neon lights running along the market roof
rain-slicked ground reflecting the neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered cyberpunk night market with red neon lights overhead. The camera moves forward along wet reflective pavement toward a food stall on the left, where a vendor is visible behind the counter. The atmosphere is dark and atmospheric with industrial metal pillars lining the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: food stall counter and service area

events.description: slows down and stops briefly at the food counter before moving past
moves past the food counter into a narrow storage corridor

agents.ego_description: approaching the food counter, observing the vendor, then moving past into the back area

notable_agents.action: vendor leaning over the food preparation counter arranging items
female customer with red cybernetic arm waiting at the counter

entered.detail: metal counter with cooking equipment and food display cases
industrial metal racks with stacked boxes and supplies
illuminated menu board with food items and prices

segments.scene_description: The camera arrives at the food stall counter where a vendor is working and a customer with a red cybernetic arm waits. The scene shifts as the camera moves past the counter into a narrower corridor with metal shelving and storage boxes, transitioning from the public serving area to the back storage space.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow storage corridor with red ambient lighting

events.description: lighting shifts from warm yellow to deep red as moving deeper into the corridor
emerging from narrow corridor into more open market area with blue lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow industrial corridor with storage racks and red lighting

notable_agents.action: two people standing against the wall in the shadows

entered.detail: dark industrial walls with pipes and conduits
tall metal shelving unit with stacked tires and boxes
stacked cardboard boxes and storage containers

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow industrial corridor with red ambient lighting, passing metal storage racks and cardboard boxes. Two figures stand in the shadows against the wall. The environment is cramped and utilitarian, transitioning from the food service area to a back corridor with industrial piping and shelving.

scene_state.functional_zone: open neon-lit market plaza with multiple vendor stalls

events.description: dramatic shift from red to blue-cyan neon lighting as entering the open market

agents.ego_description: walking through the open market area observing various stalls and neon signage

notable_agents.action: market vendor standing behind a stall counter

entered.detail: multiple vendor stalls with awnings and merchandise displays
bright cyan and blue fluorescent lights illuminating the market
metal walkway structure spanning above the market street
glowing holographic signs and digital billboards

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges into a more open market plaza bathed in blue-cyan neon light. Various market stalls line the walkway under an overhead metal catwalk structure. Holographic advertisements glow on the left side while pedestrians walk through the rain-slicked open area. The atmosphere shifts from the cramped red corridor to a vibrant, bustling neon marketplace.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked night market that transitions from a dark, red-lit industrial corridor into a vibrant, open neon plaza. It begins by moving along wet reflective pavement under red neon lights, approaching a food stall where a vendor and a customer with a cybernetic arm are positioned. As the camera passes the counter, the scene shifts into a cramped back storage area characterized by metal shelving, cardboard boxes, and figures lingering in the shadows. The movement then continues through a narrow utilitarian corridor lined with industrial piping before finally emerging into a wide market plaza. This final transition opens the environment into a bustling space bathed in blue-cyan light, featuring glowing holographic advertisements and pedestrians walking beneath an overhead metal catwalk.
